---
title: "Project Central"
date-modified: "today"
categories: [""]
format: 
  html:
    link-external-newwindow: true
    toc: true
  pdf: default
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{css, echo=FALSE}
.title{
  font-size: 30px;
  color: #3070BF;
  background-color: #fff;
  padding: 0px;
}
```

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(here)
source(here("class_dates.R"))
```

## Labs

| Lab Instructions | Editing file | Rubric | Due Date | Topics |
|---------------|---------------|---------------|---------------|---------------|
| [Lab 1](/project/Lab_01_instructions.qmd) | [[{{< iconify mdi edit-box size=30px >}}](https://github.com/nwakim/PUBH_523_26Su/blob/main/project/lastname_firstinit_lab_01.qmd)]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | [[{{< iconify material-symbols rubric-rounded size=30px >}}](/project/Lab_01_rubric.xlsx)]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | `r lab1 %>% format("%m/%d")` | Learn about WBNS + prepare your folders + download data |
| Lab 2 | [{{< iconify mdi edit-box size=30px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | [{{< iconify material-symbols rubric-rounded size=30px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | `r lab2 %>% format("%m/%d")` | Filtering data + creating variables |
| Lab 3 | [{{< iconify mdi edit-box size=30px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | [{{< iconify material-symbols rubric-rounded size=30px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | `r lab3 %>% format("%m/%d")` | Summarize your data |
| Lab 4 | [{{< iconify mdi edit-box size=30px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | [{{< iconify material-symbols rubric-rounded size=30px >}}]{style="color:#f8f5f0;"} | `r lab4 %>% format("%m/%d")` | Visualize your data |

## Final Project: Information Sheet

We are going to create a scrollable information sheet (aka an html document) using the Well-Being and Basic Needs Survey.

- Some ideas for information sheets: <https://venngage.com/templates/infographics/statistical>

##
